name: mq-http-sdk

metadata.name: mq-http-sdk
metadata.summary: Aliyun Message Queue(MQ) Http Python SDK

documentation: Provides http interfaces to Aliyun Message Queue(MQ) Service.

modules.name: setup
documentation: !/usr/bin/env python

modules.name: mq_http_sdk.mq_consumer
documentation: coding=utf-8

methods.name: mq_http_sdk.mq_consumer.MQConsumer.consume_message
mq_http_sdk.mq_consumer.MQConsumer.consume_message_orderly
mq_http_sdk.mq_consumer.MQConsumer.ack_message
mq_http_sdk.mq_consumer.Message.__init__
documentation:
消息
:: message_body         消息体
:: message_id           消息编号
:: message_body_md5     消息体的MD5值
:: consumed_times       消息被消费的次数
:: publish_time         消息发送的时间，单位：毫秒
:: first_consume_time   消息第一次被消费的时间，单位：毫秒
:: receipt_handle       下次删除的临时句柄，next_consume_time之前有效
:: next_consume_time    消息下次可消费时间
:: properties           消息的属性

modules.name: mq_http_sdk.mq_exception
documentation: coding=utf-8

classes.name: mq_http_sdk.mq_exception.MQExceptionBase
mq_http_sdk.mq_exception.MQServerException
documentation:
处理异常

@note: 根据type进行分类处理，常见错误类型：
     : InvalidArgument       参数不合法
     : AccessDenied          无权对该资源进行当前操作
     : TopicNotExist         主题不存在
     : MessageNotExist       队列中没有消息
     : 更多错误类型请移步阿里云消息和通知服务官网进行了解；

classes.name: mq_http_sdk.mq_exception.MQClientNetworkException
documentation:
网络异常

@note: 检查endpoint是否正确、本机网络是否正常等;

classes.name: mq_http_sdk.mq_exception.MQClientParameterException
documentation:
参数格式错误

@note: 请根据提示修改对应参数;

documentation:
Specify information of TopicMessage

@note: publish_message params
:: message_body        string
:: message_tag         string, used to filter message

@note: publish_message response information
:: message_id
:: message_body_md5
:: receipt_handle       string, only publish transaction msg contains, is valid
                        before TransCheckImmunityTime
